---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

<!-- What are you trying to do that Bullet Lens can't do today, or does
awkwardly? Concrete use cases help a lot. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would make it work for you? UI sketches, example workflows, or
pointers to reference implementations are welcome. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other ways to solve the same problem, and why they're not as good. -->

## Scope check

- [ ] I've read `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` and believe this fits the project's
      client-side, read-only visualization scope.
- [ ] If this needs a backend, analysis pipeline, or persistence, I've
      thought about why it doesn't belong in the R companion package
      instead.
